/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libnero_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libnero_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/nero_msgs/msg/nero_status_msg__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/nero_msgs/msg/pos_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/nero_msgs/srv/enable__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dx/ws_/PikaAnyArm/build/nero_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libnero_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
